changelog: UI: renamed 'Clients' to 'Endpoints' throughout the interface
Feature: inline customer assignment dropdown on each endpoint card
Fix: update notification banner reappears for each new version (was permanently hidden after one dismissal)
Fix: auto-update rollback on failure — restores backup and restarts service automatically
Fix: 'Reload Now' no longer re-opens the update progress modal after completing
Fix: update progress modal shows red error banner on failure
Fix: GitHub API rate limit — retry with backoff, optional GITHUB_TOKEN support
Fix: Vite allowedHosts auto-populated from URBACKUP_SERVER_FQDN setting
